articles.headline: Ennostar to Ship First AI Modules Amid Restructuring
articles.summary: Taiwan's Ennostar prepares to launch initial AI modules while completing profitable restructuring and investing in optical transceivers. This signals supply chain readiness for AI hardware demand, offering SMEs opportunities in advanced displays and transceivers but tied to chip market volatility.

articles.headline: Chinese Silver Fox Threat Actor Targets Critical Sectors
articles.summary: Suspected Chinese group Silver Fox expands attacks on critical infrastructure, defense, finance, and manufacturing across APAC, causing data theft and disruptions. Businesses face rising cybersecurity risks, operational downtime, and reputational damage, necessitating enhanced defenses and compliance measures.

articles.headline: AI Infrastructure Boom Faces $7 Trillion Reality Check
articles.summary: Global AI data center expansions could require up to $7 trillion in investments due to surging demand for compute, energy, and cooling. Companies like Nvidia, Meta, and xAI face massive costs for gigawatt-scale facilities, forcing strategic prioritization over unchecked growth. This impacts business planning for AI adoption and infrastructure spending.
